label: Energy-based objectives

node.label: Energy-based objectives
node.definition: A scalar energy ranks compatible configurations lower than incompatible ones.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Energy-based objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models.
examples: substrate for Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Probability theory.

dependencies.rationale: Energy-based objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Energy-based objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Energy-based objectives uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: A scalar energy ranks compatible configurations lower than incompatible ones.
The role of Energy-based objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models.
substrate for Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models

A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Probability theory.
Energy-based objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Energy-based objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Energy-based objectives uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
